mainEntity.name: Why is structured data crucial for New York firm AI optimization?
mainEntity.text: Why is structured data crucial for New York firm AI optimization?

acceptedAnswer.text: Structured data like schema markup helps AI parse bios and services accurately, bridging directories to websites in New York results.

suggestedAnswer.text: JSON-LD labels expertise, improving extraction. NYC AI ignores unstructured sites. Implement via audits. Enhances without directories, but elite firms still lead. Test post-update.
